FnGuide AI Semiconductor TOP2 Plus Index

requirements.name: price_snapshot
requirements.note: Local price history supports direct price-momentum derivation.

requirements.name: price_momentum
requirements.note: Derive price momentum from the local price snapshot once the rebalance window is fixed.

requirements.name: float_market_cap_snapshot
requirements.note: Free-float market cap is needed for top-2 ranking and residual weighting.

requirements.name: sector_classification
requirements.note: Local sector labels can support semiconductor screening, but not provider theme confirmation.

requirements.name: theme_membership
requirements.note: Full replication still needs FnGuide or provider-confirmed theme membership evidence.

requirements.name: sales_momentum
requirements.note: The methodology depends on official sales-momentum inputs that are not inferable from current local files.

requirements.name: composite_score
requirements.note: Composite ranking inputs remain provider-controlled unless the official scoring formula and values are supplied.

requirements.name: issuer_holdings_snapshot
requirements.note: ETF issuer holdings are useful proxy evidence but cannot prove full index replication on their own.

requirements.name: corporate_actions
requirements.note: Corporate action history is needed to keep the security universe and weights aligned through rebalance dates.

requirements.name: official_bucket_assignments
requirements.note: Official bucket assignments are required to confirm which names land in top-2, momentum, and fill buckets.

requirements.name: official_target_weights
requirements.note: Official target weights remain the primary replication and validation evidence for full fidelity.
